sample_input.jdText:
Senior Full Stack Engineer — FinTech Startup

We're a Series B fintech startup building the next generation of embedded finance infrastructure. We process $2B+ in transactions annually and are growing 3x YoY.

About the Role:
We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to join our core platform team. You'll build the systems that power real-time payment processing, fraud detection, and merchant analytics.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of full-stack experience
- Strong proficiency in React and TypeScript (frontend)
- Node.js or similar backend experience
- PostgreSQL and Redis experience
- Experience with AWS or GCP
- Prior experience in fintech, payments, or high-transaction systems is a strong plus

Nice to Have:
- GraphQL experience
- Docker/Kubernetes knowledge
- Experience with event-driven architectures (Kafka/SQS)

Compensation: $175,000 – $220,000 base + equity
Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid — 2 days/week in office)

parsed_jd_output.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
keyResponsibilities: Build and maintain payment processing APIs
Develop merchant-facing dashboards with real-time analytics
Collaborate with design and product on new features
Participate in on-call rotation for production systems

matchReasons: 6 of 7 required skills matched (React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS)
Stripe experience directly aligns with fintech/payments domain
Senior-level trajectory at top-tier fintech companies
strengths: Deep payments infrastructure background at Stripe and Razorpay
Built high-throughput APIs at production scale (10M+ transactions/day)
concerns: Salary expectation ($180k–$220k) sits at the top of the offered range

matchReasons: Strong backend systems experience with distributed architecture
Shopify (high-scale e-commerce) is adjacent to fintech domain
strengths: Go/Rust expertise for performance-critical payment paths

conversation.content: Hi Priya! I came across your profile and was really impressed by your work at Stripe on payment infrastructure. We're a Series B fintech building embedded finance and I think there could be a great fit. Would you be open to a quick chat?
Hi! Thanks for reaching out — Stripe was an amazing experience. I'm always open to hearing about interesting opportunities, especially in fintech. What kind of scale are you operating at?

We're processing $2B+ in transactions annually and growing 3x YoY. The role is Senior Full Stack — React/TypeScript on the frontend, Node.js backend, PostgreSQL and Redis. Hybrid in SF, 2 days a week.

That growth rate is impressive. The stack sounds very familiar — I've been living in that exact stack at Stripe. SF hybrid works for me. What does the team structure look like? And what's the hardest engineering problem you're solving right now?

8-person core platform team, reporting to the CTO. The hardest problem right now is building our real-time fraud detection layer without adding latency to the payment flow. Compensation is $175k–$220k base plus meaningful equity.

The fraud detection problem is genuinely interesting — we tackled something similar at Stripe. I'll be honest, I've had a couple of conversations lately but nothing that's gotten me excited like this one. The equity piece would matter a lot at Series B. Can we set up a call this week?

interestSignals: Asked thoughtful technical questions about team structure and engineering challenges
Mentioned comparing against other opportunities — showing active search
Prior domain experience creates genuine enthusiasm
redFlags: Mentioned other active conversations — may need to move quickly
Flagged equity as a priority — comp discussion needed early
top_interest_result.summary: Priya showed strong, genuine interest. Her Stripe background makes this role feel familiar rather than a stretch, which boosts confidence. She's actively interviewing elsewhere — speed matters. The equity conversation should happen in the first call.
